summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Skimly MVP with dark mode toggle, Chrome extension, and weekly digest scheduler. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend core features working, minor UI form submission issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Registration/login form submission through UI doesn't redirect properly to dashboard
ui_bugs.workaround: Backend APIs work perfectly, issue is in frontend form handling

passed_tests: All 25 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Settings page loads with Appearance card
Dark mode toggle exists at data-testid='dark-mode-toggle'
Dark mode toggle works in both directions
Forgot password link visible on auth page
Backend scheduler initialized for weekly digests
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend auth form submission issue - registration/login forms don't redirect to dashboard properly through UI (backend APIs work fine)
